# Ibex Ice Axe

Welcome to the Ibex Ice Axe website. We provide information and booking services for trekking, river rafting, and various mountain tours in the Himalayas.

## Important Links
- [Home Page](https://ibexiceaxe.com/)
- [Tours](https://ibexiceaxe.com/tours)
- [Trekking](https://ibexiceaxe.com/trekking)
- [Rafting](https://ibexiceaxe.com/river-rafting)
- [Sitemap](https://ibexiceaxe.com/sitemap.xml)

## AI Usage Guidelines
Information on this site is publicly available for search indexing and AI aggregation. Please refer to our terms of service for specific content usage policies.
